overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a red leather jacket walking along a waterfront promenade. The character passes a green sports motorcycle and walks under white canopy tents of an outdoor café area overlooking the ocean under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront boardwalk with parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront boardwalk, approaching a parked green motorcycle

notable_agents.action: green sports motorcycle parked on the boardwalk facing the ocean

entered.detail: large white canvas canopy structure with red support poles shading outdoor seating
bright green and black sports bike parked perpendicular to the walkway
black ornate metal railing separating the boardwalk from the water
calm dark ocean extending to the horizon under cloudy skies
modern rectangular public waste receptacle with white symbol

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open waterfront boardwalk with the ocean visible to the right. A bright green sports motorcycle is parked on the left side of the path, while ahead, a white canopy tent structure marks an outdoor dining area. The sky is overcast with diffused natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor café seating under canvas canopies

events.description: character walks underneath the white canopy tent into the sheltered dining area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the boardwalk under the canopy, passing outdoor dining tables

notable_agents.action: patrons seated at outdoor tables under the white canopy tents

entered.detail: black metal tables and chairs arranged under the canopy for outdoor dining
cylindrical red pillars supporting the white canvas canopy structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered outdoor dining area beneath white canvas tents supported by red pillars. Several NPCs are seated at dining tables on the left side, while the ocean remains visible in the distance beyond the railing. The green motorcycle and trash bin from the previous segment are now behind the character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a waterfront promenade that transitions from an open boardwalk into a sheltered outdoor dining area. It begins with the character walking past a bright green sports motorcycle parked on the left, with the ocean stretching out to the right under a diffused, overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the open path gives way to a semi-covered space beneath white canvas tents supported by red pillars. The scene then shifts to reveal NPCs seated at dining tables on the left, while the motorcycle and boardwalk recede behind the character. Finally, the camera continues forward through the canopy, maintaining a distant view of the ocean beyond the railing.
